topic: Every clock in the house runs backward for one hour before dawn.
title: Every Clock In My House Runs Backward At Three AM | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: Between three and four every morning, every clock in my house runs backward.
scenes.image_prompt: a dim hallway lined with several wall clocks, hands blurred, faint moonlight through a window, deep shadow, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I rent a small place at the end of a quiet street.
scenes.image_prompt: a small single-story house at the end of an empty street at night, low porch light, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I work late. I sleep poorly.
scenes.image_prompt: a rumpled bed with a bedside lamp glowing, an empty coffee mug, late night gloom, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One night I woke and watched the kitchen clock tick the wrong way.
scenes.image_prompt: a kitchen wall clock close framed from below, the second hand caught mid sweep, dim overhead light, shadows, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I told myself I was dreaming.
scenes.image_prompt: a darkened kitchen doorway, a silhouette of a person standing, faint light behind, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: But the microwave, the oven, my phone, all of them counted down together.
scenes.image_prompt: a kitchen counter with a glowing microwave display and oven clock, both blurred, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: So I started recording the screens each night.
scenes.image_prompt: a phone on a tripod aimed at a glowing clock in a dark room, red recording dot, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Every recording showed the same hour erased and replayed.
scenes.image_prompt: a laptop screen showing paused video of a clock, a dark room behind it, blue glow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: By the fourth night, things on my shelves had moved back too.
scenes.image_prompt: a bookshelf with objects slightly out of place, a knocked photo frame, dim lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then at three exactly, I heard my own front door close, from the inside.
scenes.image_prompt: a front door viewed from inside a dark entryway, a coat on a hook swinging, deep shadow, fog beyond the glass, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I have not slept through that hour since.
scenes.image_prompt: a person sitting on the edge of a bed in the dark, back to camera, faint window light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last week the clocks stopped reversing. Now they simply wait for me.
scenes.image_prompt: a single wall clock with both hands pointing straight up, dim room, long shadow across the floor, vertical 9:16 framing
